audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and no significant background noise.
temporal_description: Three individuals stand in a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with various metallic and glass objects. The central figure, with pale hair, holds a wand pointed forward, flanked by two others also holding wands in similar positions. The person on the left wears a dark outfit with a visible ring, while the one on the right is partially obscured. All three maintain a rigid posture, facing forward with focused gazes. Later, a fourth person, wearing a brown jacket, appears in the same room, standing still and facing the group.
